problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: Combining Enzymatic depolymerization of specific polymer with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
